title: Bioinformatics and Mendelian Randomization Analysis for Type 1 Diabetes Biomarkers
author: Songbai Liu

steps.title: Download transcriptomic datasets from the Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO; https://www
steps.instruction: Download transcriptomic datasets from the Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO; https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gds/): Training set: GSE156035 (platform GPL20844). Contains 20 T1D peripheral blood mononuclear cell (PBMC) samples and 20 healthy control PBMC samples. Validation set: GSE72377 (platform GPL10558). Contains 15 T1D PBMC samples and 20 healthy control PBMC samples. Access date: October 18, 2025.

steps.title: Retrieve phospholipid metabolism-related genes (PMRGs)
steps.instruction: Retrieve phospholipid metabolism-related genes (PMRGs): Download a set of 212 PMRGs from the Molecular Signatures Database (MSigDB; https://www.gsea-msigdb.org/gsea/msigdb/) using the same access date.

steps.title: Perform differential expression analysis on the...
steps.instruction: Perform differential expression analysis on the training set using the limma package in R: Input: Normalized expression matrix of GSE156035. Thresholds: adjusted P c 0.05, |log~~2 fold change| e 0.5. Output: List of differentially expressed genes (DEGs).

steps.title: Identify overlapping genes between DEGs and...
steps.instruction: Identify overlapping genes between DEGs and PMRGs using the ggvenn package: Command: ggvenn(list(DEGs, PMRGs)) Output: Candidate genes (CGs).

steps.title: Perform Gene Ontology (GO) and KEGG...
steps.instruction: Perform Gene Ontology (GO) and KEGG pathway enrichment on CGs using clusterProfiler: Parameters: p-value cutoff = 0.05, q-value cutoff = 0.2. Visualize top enriched terms.

steps.title: Construct a protein-protein interaction (PPI) network
steps.instruction: Construct a protein-protein interaction (PPI) network: Upload CG list to the STRING database (https://string-db.org/). Parameters: confidence score e 0.15. Download interaction data and visualize using Cytoscape (v3.10.2).

steps.title: Apply Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection...
steps.instruction: Apply Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection Operator (LASSO) regression using glmnet: Method: 5-fold cross-validation. Parameter: optimal λ (lambda.min) selected. Output: LASSO candidate biomarkers.

steps.title: Apply Support Vector Machine-Recursive Feature Elimination...
steps.instruction: Apply Support Vector Machine-Recursive Feature Elimination (SVM-RFE) using e1071: Method: 5-fold cross-validation, recursive feature elimination. Output: SVMRFE candidate biomarkers.

steps.title: Apply Boruta algorithm using Boruta package
steps.instruction: Apply Boruta algorithm using Boruta package: Parameters: 100 iterations, P c 0.01. Output: Boruta candidate biomarkers.

steps.title: Take the intersection of LASSO candidate,...
steps.instruction: Take the intersection of LASSO candidate, SVMRFE candidate, and Boruta candidate biomarkers using ggvenn to obtain final candidate biomarkers.

steps.title: Validate expression levels of candidate biomarkers...
steps.instruction: Validate expression levels of candidate biomarkers in both training and validation sets using Wilcoxon signed-rank test (P c 0.05).

steps.title: Perform receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve...
steps.instruction: Perform receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve analysis using pROC: Calculate area under the curve (AUC) for each biomarker. Threshold: AUC e 0.7 indicates good diagnostic performance.

steps.title: Select final biomarkers based on consistent...
steps.instruction: Select final biomarkers based on consistent expression trends and high AUC in both cohorts.

steps.title: Build a nomogram using rms package...
steps.instruction: Build a nomogram using rms package based on final biomarker expression in the training set.

steps.title: Assess calibration with Hosmer-Lemeshow test (P e 0
steps.instruction: Assess calibration with Hosmer-Lemeshow test (P e 0.05) and calibration curve.

steps.title: Plot ROC curve for the nomogram and calculate AUC
steps.instruction: Plot ROC curve for the nomogram and calculate AUC.

steps.title: Perform decision curve analysis (DCA) using...
steps.instruction: Perform decision curve analysis (DCA) using ggDCA to evaluate clinical utility.

steps.title: Perform Spearman correlation between each final...
steps.instruction: Perform Spearman correlation between each final biomarker and all other genes in the training set using base R cor() function.

steps.title: Rank genes by correlation coefficient
steps.instruction: Rank genes by correlation coefficient.

steps.title: Run GSEA using clusterProfiler with the...
steps.instruction: Run GSEA using clusterProfiler with the MSigDB KEGG gene set "c2.cp.v2024.1.Hs.symbols.gmt". Parameters: |normalized enrichment score (NES)| e 1, adjusted P c 0.05.

steps.title: Visualize top enriched pathways using enrichplot
steps.instruction: Visualize top enriched pathways using enrichplot.

steps.title: Calculate enrichment scores for 28 immune...
steps.instruction: Calculate enrichment scores for 28 immune cell types using single-sample GSEA (ssGSEA) implemented in GSVA: Input: Normalized expression matrix of training set. Method: ssGSEA.

steps.title: Identify differentially infiltrated immune cells (DIICs)...
steps.instruction: Identify differentially infiltrated immune cells (DIICs) between T1D and control groups using Wilcoxon rank-sum test (P c 0.05).

steps.title: Perform Spearman correlation analysis using psych
steps.instruction: Perform Spearman correlation analysis using psych: Between DIICs and between biomarkers and DIICs. Thresholds: |correlation coefficient| e 0.3, P c 0.05.

steps.title: Predict miRNAs targeting each final biomarker using
steps.instruction: Predict miRNAs targeting each final biomarker using: miRWalk database (http://mirwalk.umm.uni-heidelberg.de/) TarBase database (https://dianalab.e-ce.uth.gr/tarbasev9/)

steps.title: Identify overlapping miRNAs from both databases
steps.instruction: Identify overlapping miRNAs from both databases.

steps.title: Build regulatory network using Cytoscape
steps.instruction: Build regulatory network using Cytoscape.

steps.title: Map chromosomal locations of final biomarkers using RCircos
steps.instruction: Map chromosomal locations of final biomarkers using RCircos.

steps.title: Retrieve subcellular localization from GeneCards database (https://www
steps.instruction: Retrieve subcellular localization from GeneCards database (https://www.genecards.org/).

steps.title: Predict potential drugs targeting final biomarkers...
steps.instruction: Predict potential drugs targeting final biomarkers using DSigDB (Drug Signatures Database; https://dsigdb.tanlab.org/DSigDBv1.0/).

steps.title: Select core drugs that target both...
steps.instruction: Select core drugs that target both biomarkers with highest combined scores.

steps.title: Retrieve 3D structures
steps.instruction: Retrieve 3D structures: Protein structures from Protein Data Bank (PDB; https://www.rcsb.org/) or UniProt (https://www.uniprot.org/). Drug structures from PubChem (https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/).

steps.title: Perform molecular docking using PyRx software (v0.8.0)
steps.instruction: Perform molecular docking using PyRx software (v0.8.0): Binding energy threshold: c -5 kcal/mol indicates favorable binding.

steps.title: Visualize docking poses with PyMOL (v2
steps.instruction: Visualize docking poses with PyMOL (v2.5; Schrödinger, LLC).

steps.title: All statistical tests were performed in R (v4
steps.instruction: All statistical tests were performed in R (v4.3.3).

steps.title: Two-group comparisons
steps.instruction: Two-group comparisons: Wilcoxon rank-sum test.

steps.title: Correlation analyses
steps.instruction: Correlation analyses: Spearman’s test.

steps.title: A list of DEGs, CGs, and final biomarkers
steps.instruction: A list of DEGs, CGs, and final biomarkers.

steps.title: LASSO, SVM-RFE, and Boruta feature selections
steps.instruction: LASSO, SVM-RFE, and Boruta feature selections.

steps.title: Validated biomarkers (ETNK1 and CEPT1) with...
steps.instruction: Validated biomarkers (ETNK1 and CEPT1) with expression plots and ROC curves.

steps.title: A nomogram with calibration, ROC, and DCA plots
steps.instruction: A nomogram with calibration, ROC, and DCA plots.

steps.title: GSEA enrichment results and immune infiltration profiles
steps.instruction: GSEA enrichment results and immune infiltration profiles.

steps.title: miRNA-mRNA regulatory network
steps.instruction: miRNA-mRNA regulatory network.

steps.title: Drug prediction and molecular docking results with binding energies
steps.instruction: Drug prediction and molecular docking results with binding energies.
